description: Minimal telemetry dashboard with only essential metrics

daily_active_users.name: Daily Active Users
daily_active_users.description: Count of unique users per day (combining activation and daily user events)
daily_active_users.kql:
customEvents
| where name in ('gitmind.daily_active_user', 'gitmind.extension_activation')
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| summarize UniqueUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id)) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp desc

message_generation_failures.name: Message Generation Failures
message_generation_failures.description: Errors that prevent message generation from working
message_generation_failures.kql:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize
    ErrorCount = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id))
by
    Provider = tostring(customDimensions.provider),
    ErrorType = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| order by ErrorCount desc

failure_trends.name: Failure Trends Over Time
failure_trends.kql:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize
    FailureCount = count()
by
    bin(timestamp, 1d),
    Provider = tostring(customDimensions.provider)
| order by timestamp desc

error_types_summary.name: Error Types Summary
error_types_summary.kql:
customEvents
| where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize
    Count = count(),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id))
by ErrorType = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| order by Count desc

high_failure_rate.name: High Message Generation Failure Rate
high_failure_rate.condition: customEvents | where name == 'gitmind.message_generation_failure' | where timestamp > ago(1h) | count
high_failure_rate.description: Alert when more than 10 message generation failures occur in 1 hour

notes: All other telemetry has been removed to eliminate noise.
Auto-collection of exceptions is disabled to prevent irrelevant errors.
Success events are not tracked to reduce data volume.
